name: stt
description: Whisper STT via whisper-rs (whisper.cpp). Transcribes audio files on disk to text. Model: whisper-ggml-small (~244 MB RSS warmed). Requires ffmpeg at runtime for audio decoding.

tools.name: stt.transcribe
tools.description: Transcribe an audio file to text using Whisper. Accepts any format ffmpeg can decode (WAV, OGG/Opus, MP3, M4A, WebM, FLAC). Returns the transcript text.

audio_path.description: Absolute or relative path to the audio file.

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code (e.g. 'en', 'es', 'fr'). Omit for auto-detect.
